CustomField.formula:
IF(ISPICKVAL(Reporting_Month__c, "December"), DATE(VALUE(TEXT(Reporting_Year__c)), 12, 31),
DATE( VALUE(TEXT(Reporting_Year__c)), CASE( TEXT(Reporting_Month__c), "January", 2, "February", 3, "March", 4, "April", 5, "May", 6, "June", 7, "July", 8, "August", 9, "September", 10, "October", 11, "November", 12, "December", 13, /* rolls over into next year */ 2 ), 1 )
-
1 )
CustomField.label: Reporting End Date
